comment.body:
Does this sentence refer to the whole trading day, or only to the period after the FOMC decision and press conference?
We have a very strong “line in the sand” in the 6840/50 zone, very low chance to break beyond this line into any direction, once the spot is above or below this zone, and most likely a reversion line.
In order to break through this, you need to see constant directional bid and low realized volatility.
